name: Aurelia Velvet Curved Sofa
shortDescription: Handcrafted curved statement sofa upholstered in royal emerald velvet with brushed gold brass trim base.
fullDescription: The Aurelia Curved Sofa brings sculptural drama and supreme comfort to modern luxury living spaces. Tailored by master upholsterers, its sweeping silhouette is wrapped in opulent stain-resistant cotton velvet and supported by a concealed kiln-dried hardwood frame anchored with brushed champagne gold stainless steel.

specifications.Material: Italian Cotton Velvet, Solid Ash, Brushed Brass Base

reviews.author: Victoria Sterling
reviews.title: Absolute Centerpiece of our Living Room
reviews.comment: The tactile texture of the velvet and the architectural curve elevated our whole salon. White glove delivery was flawless.

reviews.author: Julian Vance
reviews.title: Unrivaled Craftsmanship
reviews.comment: Extremely comfortable yet maintains its firm sculptural shape. Worth every penny.

name: Calacatta Gold Marble Dining Table
shortDescription: Quarried Tuscan Calacatta gold marble slab with polished bullnose edge and ribbed dark walnut pedestal base.
fullDescription: Each Calacatta Gold Dining Table features unique dramatic grey and golden honey veining sourced directly from Carrara quarries. Sealed with an invisible stain shield matte coat and paired with a fluted solid walnut pedestal.

specifications.Material: Natural Calacatta Gold Marble, American Black Walnut
specifications.Care Instructions: Wipe with pH-neutral marble cleaner. Avoid acidic fluids.

reviews.author: Elena Rostova
reviews.title: Breathtaking Marble Veining
reviews.comment: The gold veining is even more gorgeous in person. It dominates dinner conversations in the best way.

name: Solstice Sculptural Brass Chandelier
shortDescription: Tiered brushed solid brass mobile chandelier with hand-blown frosted opal glass spheres.
fullDescription: Art meets illumination in the Solstice Chandelier. Inspired by celestial movement, six asymmetric brass arms balance mouth-blown opal glass diffusers that emit warm ambient light.

specifications.Dimensions: Diameter: 48" x Height adjustable up to 72"

reviews.author: David Chen
reviews.title: Stunning Light Diffusion
reviews.comment: Hangs over our high-ceiling foyer. The dimming warmth creates an exquisite evening atmosphere.

name: Kyoto Minimalist Oak Platform Bed
shortDescription: Floating solid Japanese White Oak bed frame with integrated bedside ledge and leather headboard cushions.
fullDescription: Embracing Japandi principles, the Kyoto Bed features jointed solid oak joinery with no visible metallic hardware. Includes dual plush grain-leather headboard pillows attached with matte brass pegs.

specifications.Dimensions: King Size: W: 86" x L: 94" x H: 38"
specifications.Material: Solid White Oak, Full Grain Aniline Leather
specifications.Slats: Included solid pine ergonomic slat bed base

reviews.author: Sora Takahashi
reviews.title: Zen Perfection
reviews.comment: Solid wood quality is undeniable. Grounded, serene, and incredibly sturdy.

name: Belgian Heavy Linen Curtains (Pair)
shortDescription: 100% Organic Belgian flax linen drapes with hidden rod pocket and tailored blackout liner.
fullDescription: Woven in Flanders using eco-certified flax, these drapes provide soft acoustic dampening and gentle light filtering. Pre-washed for a supple, relaxed drape with tailored weighted hems.

specifications.Hanging Style: Back Tab / Rod Pocket / Curtain Rings

name: Elysian Botanical Metallic Wallpaper
shortDescription: Hand-screened mural wallcovering featuring subtle gold leaf botanical silhouettes on obsidian ground.
fullDescription: Transform your dining room or master suite with the Elysian mural. Non-woven breathable substrate embossed with micro gold foil accents that reflect ambient candlelight.

specifications.Roll Coverage: 56 sq ft per roll (20.5" W x 33' L)

name: Verdant Monstera Obliqua in Brass Pot
shortDescription: Acclimatized botanical centerpiece presented in a hammered solid brass planter with saucer base.
fullDescription: Carefully cultivated in boutique glasshouses, this mature specimen boasts lush perforated foliage. Comes potted in organic nutrient-rich aerated medium with brass pedestal planter.

name: Atelier Bronze Sculptural Mirror
shortDescription: Asymmetric lost-wax bronze cast wall mirror with bevelled crystal glass center.
fullDescription: A fusion of fine art and function. Hand-cast bronze frame featuring organic undulating edges patinated with hand-rubbed champagne gold highlights.

name: Nero Marquina Marble Board & Brass Cutlery
shortDescription: Spanish Nero Marquina black marble cheese board with 4-piece forged brass tasting knives.
fullDescription: Host in grandeur with this polished black marble serving tray finished with non-slip brass feet and accompanied by handcrafted champagne gold cheese tools.

specifications.Dimensions: Board: 18" L x 12" W x 0.75" H
specifications.Material: Nero Marquina Marble, Forged Stainless Steel with Gold PVD

name: Executive Walnut & Aniline Leather Desk
shortDescription: Sculptural executive desk with leather inlaid writing top and concealed wireless charging bay.
fullDescription: Designed for visionaries. Crafted from bookmatched American Black Walnut with soft-close hidden drawers, brushed gold cable grommets, and top-grain Italian leather writing pad.

specifications.Material: American Walnut, Aniline Full Grain Leather, Brass Hardware
specifications.Features: Hidden cable management, Qi Wireless Charging Base built-in

name: Velvet Sculptural Dining Chair Set (4)
shortDescription: Set of 4 upholstered dining armchairs with champagne gold legs and wrap-around cushioned backrest.

specifications.Dimensions: W: 23" x D: 22" x H: 32" (Seat Height: 19")
specifications.Material: Mohair Velvet, Steel Frame with Gold Finish

name: Onyx & Crystal Whiskey Decanter Set
shortDescription: Hand-cut lead-free crystal decanter with black onyx stopper and 4 heavy tumbler glasses.

name: Minimalist Fluted Glass Pendant Light
shortDescription: Vertical ribbed glass pendant with solid brass hardware and braided textile cord.
fullDescription: Sleek and luminous. Fluted transparent glass cylinder diffuses ambient downward light over kitchen islands or bedside tables.

name: Cloud Bouclé Sectional Sofa

specifications.Dimensions: Overall: 124" W x 88" Depth x 32" Height
specifications.Filling: Hypoallergenic Goose Down & High Resiliency Foam Core

shortDescription: 6-foot tall living Ficus Lyrata tree with lush fiddle leaves in handcrafted matte terracotta pot.
